title: Cobblemon No Man's Craft Compatibility Patch
description: Fixes Cobblemon not spawning and asphyxiating on alien planets
body:
Updated datapack to support latest No Man's Craft and Stellaris. Has old spawn tables updated so Vanilla planets will have specific Cobblemon like before. Going to be adding more cobblemon variety later on.

![Pokemon Center on Lava Ocean Planet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UdAJ9VVw/images/fc9dfad2d1253209b0342e94e7e9be1b1fb520c3.png)
![Pokemon Gym on Lava Ocean Planet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UdAJ9VVw/images/01c99fee25c3afa5a30de64cb58df66454055595.png)
- Based on Stellaris 1.2.5 datapack by Zyxey
- [https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-stellaris-compatibility-patch](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-stellaris-compatibility-patch)
